titles.text: Pika Pika Nurse Monogatari: Hatsuratsu Nurse Ikusei Game

descriptions.text: Pika Pika Nurse Monogatari: Hatsuratsu Nurse Ikusei Game is a Strategy game, published by TDK Core, which was released in Japan in 2003.
You are hired as a nurse/temp for a city hospital. You help the doctor by changing diapers, feeding the kids, and cleaning up.
